Who I Am

A developer with
an eye for design.

01

I'm Roger B. Cuizon, a 3rd-year Bachelor of Science in Computer Science student at North Eastern Mindanao State University (NEMSU) in Lianga, Surigao del Sur.

I'm passionate about building web systems that are not just functional, but intuitive and enjoyable to use. My background spans full-stack development, database design, and mobile computing — giving me a versatile foundation to tackle real-world problems.

I'm actively seeking an entry-level position as a Web Designer where I can contribute meaningfully while continuing to grow professionally. I thrive in collaborative environments and bring strong communication and problem-solving skills to every project.

What I've Built

Projects

03
Project 01 Full-Stack System

Library Management System

A comprehensive library management platform designed to streamline all library operations. Features include book cataloging with ISBN tracking, user borrowing and return management, inventory control, fine processing, advanced search, and an analytics dashboard for data-driven administrative decisions. Includes both admin and user modes.

Dashboard Books Management User Management Transactions Fines & Reports CRUD Analytics
Project 01 — Detail Admin Panel

Books Management Module

The books management module within the Library System — featuring search and filter by category, type, and availability. Supports adding, editing, and managing physical book copies with shelf location tracking.

Search & Filter Inventory Location Tracking
Project 02 Web Application

Restaurant Menu & Ordering CMS

A full-featured restaurant platform — "Rodge & Cler" — enabling customers to browse categorized menus, add items to cart, manage order quantities, and proceed to checkout. The admin CMS handles digital menu management, order processing, inventory, kitchen operations, and provides sales analytics and customer insights.

Menu CMS Shopping Cart Order Processing Payments Inventory Analytics

Bachelor of Science in Computer Science (BSCS)
